summary: Frontend-only regression for CVSA Split-Sleeper rule pivot in Split Sleeper Trainer. All 13 requested test points verified end-to-end: Learn tab CVSA bullets + shift markers on SL1-SL5 (including 'Show more examples' extras), Practice tab SP1-SP4 full 4-question flow with all answers (split?, shift START/END, counted hours, violation). 100% pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Note: /app/memory/test_credentials.md references button id `badge-continue` but the live component uses `badge-continue-btn`; memory doc and PIN flow (no `pin-continue`, enter-key auto-submit) should be updated for future testing agents.
hosScenarios.js is ~1300 lines and growing — consider splitting SPLIT_LEARN_SCENARIOS / SPLIT_PRACTICE_SCENARIOS / LEARN_CONTENT into separate modules for maintainability.
SplitSleeperPage imports useMemo (unused in LearnTab scope — only in PracticeTab) — minor lint, no impact.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/hos/EldGrid.js (added data-testid="eld-entry-{idx}" to the selectable <g> group so Playwright can click individual duty-status blocks; no behavior change)
test_credentials: Badge 042 / PIN 1234 (auto-submits on Enter; button data-testid is `badge-continue-btn`, not `badge-continue`).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login flow: #badge-input → click #badge-continue-btn → #pin-input (4-digit PIN auto-submits via Enter; no pin-continue btn). Split Sleeper page route: /hours-of-service/split-sleeper. EldGrid now exposes data-testid eld-entry-{idx} on each selectable duty block (added this iteration). Learn cards: learn-card-{SL_ID}, multi-day: learn-card-{SL_ID}-day-{i}, extras: learn-extras-{SL_ID}. Practice questions: q-split / q-shift / q-hours / q-violation with -start/-end/-h14/-h11/-submit/-next/-feedback suffixes and answer buttons q-split-yes|no, q-violation-none|11|14|both. Tolerance on shift-time question is ±10 min; hours question ±0.5.
verified_checkpoints: Split Sleeper page renders without errors
'How to identify the work shift' card shows both CVSA bullets (START=END of FIRST segment, STOP=BEGINNING of SECOND segment)
SL1: Shift START 13:00 / END 17:00, 4h gold bracket
SL2: Shift START 08:00 / END 13:00, 5h gold bracket
SL5 Day1: START 14:00 END 19:00 (both on Day 1); Day2: Next shift START 03:00 END 10:00
SP1 (7+3): blocks [2,4] correct; shift 13:00/17:00 accepted; hours 4/4; no violation
SP2 (8 SB + 2 OFF): blocks [0,4] correct; shift 08:00/21:00; hours 13/12; violation=11
SP3 (invalid 4h OFF + 4h SB): no blocks; shift 06:00/20:00; hours 10/10; no violation
SP4 (invalid 8 OFF + 2 SB): no blocks; shift 00:00/14:00; hours 6/8; violation=14
No JS runtime errors / no blank renders across all flows
